reasons: A new advisory-only deliberation surface now renders deterministic candidate actions from work packets, projects, motions, manual candidates, and planned toolchain targets.
Participating agents are loaded directly from the Agent Registry, and every candidate resolves to the existing repo-plus-surface-plus-optional-project targeting model.
Per-agent reasoning, non-binding advisory votes, consensus summaries, and copy-only next-step prompts are visible without enabling execution or mutation.
jai-pilot and vscode-nexus are represented only as planned toolchain targets, with no integration, credential enablement, or runtime execution path.
Required gates passed, no API or DB mutation was added, no runtime or proof files changed, and no existing motion packages were modified.
No execution, branch write, PR creation, dispatch, scheduler, or cross-repo mutation capability was introduced.
